discovered_test_scope.message: Executing every executable Playwright spec/test file found under tests/** explicitly. Feature files are skipped by design.

mcp_assist.execution_note: MCP config is prepared for AI/browser-assist. Playwright Test remains the deterministic runner for repeatable reports, screenshots, videos and CI.
notes: Playwright MCP is a browser automation server for AI agents/IDEs.
This repo writes MCP config and verifies prerequisites before execution.
By default the GUI skips the live `npx @playwright/mcp@latest --help` probe to avoid long waits on slow/corporate VMs.
To run the live probe, set AIQA_MCP_LIVE_PROBE=true or call the explicit MCP live-probe endpoint.
mcp_assist.probe_message: Live MCP package probe skipped to keep GUI responsive on VMs. npm/npx exists and config files were written.

pom_compliance.rule: Specs should call reusable page methods; page methods should use pageObjects/locator modules. RCA patches should prefer pageObjects/pages/helpers over specs.

execution_recommendation.target_scope: existing framework specs discovered from the provided folder

strict_rules: Bypass Requirement/Input/Testcase/Generated Playwright phases for this mode.
Do not copy or overwrite the user's framework into generated-playwright.
Execute the framework in-place from the provided folder.
RCA and self-healing must use failed-tests inventory only.
Patch failed specs and their imported page/pageObject/helper files only.
Prefer PageObjects first, then page methods/BasePage/helpers; avoid raw locator fixes inside specs.
Robust RCA uses five signals before patching: DOM diff, trace timing, HAR diff, fixture/seed diff, and cross-run flakiness frequency.
Assertion updates are blocked unless the assertion drift classifier marks the change as cosmetic and above semantic threshold.

object_repository_locator_audit.human_summary: Scanned 0 object/page/locator file(s), found 0 locator definition(s), statically matched 0, and marked 0 for live Playwright MCP verification when the related workflow fails.
object_repository_locator_audit.live_mcp_note: Use Check failed element with Playwright MCP after a real failure. It inspects the failed page state and identifies whether the element is missing, detached, hidden, blocked by overlay, inside iframe/shadow DOM, or needs a new locator in the pageObject repository.

issues.title: PageObject/locator folder not detected
issues.detail: Locator definitions may be mixed with page methods or specs.
issues.safe_fix: Create/use pageObjects/<PageName>.objects.ts and keep locators separate from test specs.

issues.title: Inline locators inside specs
issues.detail: Detected inline page.locator/getBy* calls in 8 spec file(s).
issues.safe_fix: RCA/self-healing should prefer pageObjects/pages/helper files; edit specs only when unavoidable.

issues.title: Trace collection not visible in Playwright config
issues.detail: RCA is stronger with trace/video/screenshot evidence.
issues.safe_fix: Enable trace: 'on-first-retry', screenshot/video on failure through approved config update.

recommended_actions.action: Create/use pageObjects/<PageName>.objects.ts and keep locators separate from test specs.
recommended_actions.why: Locator definitions may be mixed with page methods or specs.
recommended_actions.how_to_apply: Use Fix failed tests safely / AI full-control framework fix so backup, approval, validation and rollback remain active.

recommended_actions.why: Detected inline page.locator/getBy* calls in 8 spec file(s).
recommended_actions.how_to_apply: Use Fix failed tests safely / AI full-control framework fix so backup, approval, validation and rollback remain active.

recommended_actions.action: Enable trace: 'on-first-retry', screenshot/video on failure through approved config update.
recommended_actions.why: RCA is stronger with trace/video/screenshot evidence.
recommended_actions.how_to_apply: Use Fix failed tests safely / AI full-control framework fix so backup, approval, validation and rollback remain active.

for_humans: Understand mode detects Playwright alignment gaps and writes this report; it does not silently rewrite your enterprise framework.
Fix mode uses this alignment memory plus failed-test evidence to patch only approved files with backup and rollback.
RCA remains failed-only: passed scripts and unrelated files are not patched.
rca_self_healing_order: 1. Confirm exact failed test and retry history.
2. Read Playwright console, JSON/html report, trace/video/screenshot paths and worker evidence.
3. Map failed spec -> imported page -> pageObject/locator/helper/test data using the framework memory.
4. Classify root cause: locator/DOM, not-interactable, timing, popup/permission, network/cert, data/fixture, assertion/product drift, or framework config.
5. Patch smallest approved file first: pageObjects -> page methods/BasePage/helpers -> fixture/test data -> spec only if unavoidable.
6. Rerun failed-only; rollback automatically if validation fails under strict policy.
human_understandable_strategy.central_vm_rule: In VM/VDI mode, RCA, source patching, AI memory and consolidated reports stay on the Central VM. Workers execute browsers and return evidence only.

agents.architecture_agent: folder/file role mapping and POM layer detection
agents.aut_flow_agent: AUT routes, business keywords, auth/session/API hints
agents.safe_patch_scope_agent: spec dependency chains and allowed patch candidates
agents.memory_agent: writes reusable understanding into project memory

recommendations: XPath usage is high. Prefer getByRole/getByTestId/getByLabel where AUT exposes stable accessibility/test id attributes.
Generic locator() usage exists but test id strategy is not visible. Consider a formal data-testid contract with dev team.
Anti-patterns detected: raw waitForTimeout/force:true/test.skip/inline spec locators. Guarded self-healing should avoid adding more of these.

aut_understanding.note: This is static AUT understanding from tests/config/docs. MCP/headed execution adds runtime page/accessibility evidence after failures.

architecture_recommendations: Dedicated pageObjects/locator layer is not clearly visible. Existing locator style must be learned from pages/helpers before patching.
Brittle locator ratio is high. Use MCP/accessibility evidence to migrate unstable locators carefully in related failed scope.
Some imports could not be resolved. Configure tsconfig alias mapping or confirm framework root to improve safe patch scope.
Before any automatic fix, resolve failed spec dependency chain and patch only the related spec/page/pageObject/helper/testData files.

rca_self_healing_policy.explain_failed_tests: Use execution logs, failed inventory, dependency chain, RAG chunks, MCP evidence and framework memory to classify root cause.
rca_self_healing_policy.check_failed_element_with_mcp: Use runtime accessibility/DOM/actionability evidence for the failed locator/action; does not modify files.
safe_fix_order: fixtures/testData if evidence proves data issue
spec file only when no reusable layer exists
human_intervention_required_when: assertion drift is functional or numeric
Codex/Ollama patch confidence is below threshold
unresolved import graph prevents safe mapping

normal_flows.architecture_observation: Specs should remain thin; page classes should hold business flows; pageObjects/locator modules should hold locator definitions.

backend_connections.recommendation: Validate backend/API health before patching UI scripts. For 401/403/500/empty payloads, classify as auth/data/environment/product issue unless the script wait strategy is wrong.

vdi_vm_vpn_knowledge.important_note: The framework can only infer VDI/VM/VPN knowledge from repository files, env examples, scripts, and docs. If the app runs only on a specific VDI/VPN, add that as project metadata in the GUI so RCA can classify network/auth failures correctly instead of patching tests.

rag_index.embedding_strategy: local deterministic sparse hash embeddings stored under the selected framework; replaceable with enterprise vector DB/OpenAI/Ollama embeddings

cache_storage_policy.why: Existing-framework learning must follow the exact framework path provided by the user. Central files are GUI mirrors only and should not be treated as the source of truth.

operating_rules: Use RAG chunks to retrieve only relevant page/spec/pageObject/helper context before calling Codex/Ollama.
Do not generate duplicate locators or methods when an existing reusable layer is indexed.
Validate API/DB/test data/environment signals before classifying a failure as a script issue.
RCA output must be plain English for humans plus structured JSON for automation.
Use auditable reasoning summaries, not hidden chain-of-thought transcripts.

message: Existing framework execution completed in-place. If failures exist, run Existing Framework RCA/Self-Healing; failed-only scope is already recorded.
